indicator_text: A wide breadth of lobbyists are included, e.g. professional lobbyists/consultants, in-house lobbyists, professional consultancies, law firms, think tanks, research institutions, public entities, government agencies/employees
source_quote: Verbatim Suppl File 1 Table 4 ("Details of weighted indicators") of Lacy-Nichols 2025. Per the table caption: "The CPI and Roth weights were normalised to the Bednarova framework (original weights shown in parenthesis). The weights given for each framework were summed (total column).
